parameters.content:
## Generate PDF Manuscript

Self-publishing authors and publishing platforms use this recipe to generate a print-ready PDF manuscript for KDP or IngramSpark. Define a 6x9 inch page with proper margins, title page, table of contents, and chapter content — ready for print-on-demand submission.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Generate Document
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.
